text: Planning page for R21 co-investigator list. Draft from January 2026. Still needs Bagamoyo PI confirmation with Sarah before submission.
Draft co-I list (missing Bagamoyo pending confirm)

TODO - confirm Bagamoyo PI participation with Sarah before submission. Not currently on this list.
R21 application submitted to NIAID February 15 2026. Full co-I list included Bagamoyo. This page reflects the submitted document of record.
Co-investigators (submitted cover letter)
Sarah Kelley PhD - University of Colorado - co-PI - RTS-S implementation lead
Kevin Osborne MD - Glenwood College - co-PI - mentor and clinical lead
Kwame Osei-Adu MD PhD - Kintampo Health Research Centre - Ghana site PI
Amina Wanjiku PhD - KEMRI-Wellcome Trust Kilifi - Kenya site coord
Domingos Rodrigues MD - CISM Manhica - Mozambique site PI
Ibrahim Ouedraogo MD - IRSS Nanoro - Burkina Faso site PI
Fatuma Mwakumbi MD MPH - Ifakara Health Bagamoyo - Tanzania site PI
Multi-site RTS-S implementation study. University of Colorado partnership. 5 field sites across sub-Saharan Africa. Amendment 4 active as of September 2026.
Coverage reconciliation uses two-source verification per site. Newest and closest to source wins. Sites where sources disagree carry open conclusion.
Faculty search programs being tracked. Cross-reference with Greenhouse tracker for application status. IDWeek 2026 networking scheduled for 7 targets. All held for approval before send.
